path = 'C:/Github_repositories/Webpage/index.html'
with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

import re
new_content = re.sub\(
    r'<script>\\s*\\\(function \\\(\\\) \\{.*?\\}\\\)\\\(\\\);\\s*</script>',
    '<script src=\\"js/main.js\\"></script>',
    content,
    flags=re.DOTALL
\)
with open\(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(new_content\)
print\('done, size:', len\(new_content\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import struct, zlib, os

def get_png_size\(path\):
    with open\(path, 'rb'\) as f:
        sig = f.read\(8\)
        f.read\(4\)  # length
        chunk = f.read\(4\)
        if chunk == b'IHDR':
            w = struct.unpack\('>I', f.read\(4\)\)[0]
            h = struct.unpack\('>I', f.read\(4\)\)[0]
            return \(w, h\)
    return None

base = 'C:/Users/olive/OneDrive - Danmarks Tekniske Universitet/Poul Løgstrup Bjergs filer - Work_Projects_Oliver Lund/Regionernes overfladevand/Plots, tabeller og kort/Kort_til_rapport'
files = [
    'alle_regioner_vandlob_combined.png',
    'alle_regioner_vandlob_top_branches.png',
    'V1V2.png',
    'Stof_kolonner_kort/alle_regioner_pfas.png',
    'Påvist_forurening_ja_nej_kort/alle_regioner_vandlob.png',
    'merged_displaced_kort/merged_displaced_Syddanmark_Losseplads.png',
]
for f in files:
    p = os.path.join\(base, f\)
    if os.path.exists\(p\):
        size = get_png_size\(p\)
        fsize = os.path.getsize\(p\) // 1024
        print\(f'{f}: {size} — {fsize} KB'\)
    else:
        print\(f'{f}: NOT FOUND'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from PIL import Image
import os

src_base = 'C:/Users/olive/OneDrive - Danmarks Tekniske Universitet/Poul Løgstrup Bjergs filer - Work_Projects_Oliver Lund/Regionernes overfladevand/Plots, tabeller og kort/Kort_til_rapport'
dst_dir = 'C:/Github_repositories/Webpage/Images/projects/project-01'
os.makedirs\(dst_dir, exist_ok=True\)

images = [
    \('alle_regioner_vandlob_combined.png',          'overview-all-regions.jpg'\),
    \('V1V2.png',                                     'v1v2-sites.jpg'\),
    \('Stof_kolonner_kort/alle_regioner_pfas.png',    'compounds-pfas.jpg'\),
    \('Påvist_forurening_ja_nej_kort/alle_regioner_vandlob.png', 'contamination-status.jpg'\),
    \('merged_displaced_kort/merged_displaced_Syddanmark_Losseplads.png', 'detail-syddanmark-losseplads.jpg'\),
]

for src_rel, dst_name in images:
    src = os.path.join\(src_base, src_rel\)
    dst = os.path.join\(dst_dir, dst_name\)
    with Image.open\(src\) as im:
        w, h = im.size
        new_w = 1400
        new_h = int\(h * new_w / w\)
        resized = im.resize\(\(new_w, new_h\), Image.LANCZOS\)
        resized.convert\('RGB'\).save\(dst, 'JPEG', quality=82, optimize=True\)
        fsize = os.path.getsize\(dst\) // 1024
        print\(f'{dst_name}: {new_w}x{new_h} — {fsize} KB'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from PIL import Image
import os

src_base = 'C:/Github_repositories/Webpage/Images/gallery'
dst_base = 'C:/Github_repositories/Webpage/Images/gallery'

for subfolder in ['Maps', 'Plots']:
    src_dir = os.path.join\(src_base, subfolder\)
    for fname in sorted\(os.listdir\(src_dir\)\):
        src = os.path.join\(src_dir, fname\)
        with Image.open\(src\) as im:
            w, h = im.size
            if w > 1400:
                new_w = 1400
                new_h = int\(h * new_w / w\)
                resized = im.resize\(\(new_w, new_h\), Image.LANCZOS\)
                resized.convert\('RGB'\).save\(src.replace\('.png','.jpg'\).replace\('.PNG','.jpg'\), 'JPEG', quality=82\)
                print\(f'Resized {subfolder}/{fname} → {new_w}x{new_h}'\)
            else:
                print\(f'OK {subfolder}/{fname} {w}x{h}'\)
")

sources = [
    \(r'C:/Users/olive/OneDrive - Danmarks Tekniske Universitet/Poul Løgstrup Bjergs filer - Work_Projects_Oliver Lund/InSa-Drikkevand_PFAS og pesticider/Plots, tabeller og kort/Combined_dybdefordeling.png', 'depth-distribution.jpg'\),
    \(r'C:/Users/olive/OneDrive - Danmarks Tekniske Universitet/Poul Løgstrup Bjergs filer - Work_Projects_Oliver Lund/InSa-Drikkevand_PFAS og pesticider/Plots, tabeller og kort/DIN Forsyning/Summeret frekvens/DIN Forsyning_Pesticider_summeretFrekvens.png', 'din-pesticides-freq.jpg'\),
    \(r'C:/Users/olive/OneDrive - Danmarks Tekniske Universitet/Poul Løgstrup Bjergs filer - Work_Projects_Oliver Lund/InSa-Drikkevand_PFAS og pesticider/Plots, tabeller og kort/GEUS Kontrol plots/Summeret frekvens/GEUS Kontrol plots_Pesticider_summeretFrekvens.png', 'geus-national-freq.jpg'\),
    \(r'C:/Users/olive/OneDrive - Danmarks Tekniske Universitet/Poul Løgstrup Bjergs filer - Work_Projects_Oliver Lund/InSa-Drikkevand_PFAS og pesticider/Varighed af PFAS og Pesticider/Plots/Staurbyskov/combined_starubyskov.png', 'pumping-staurbyskov.jpg'\),
]

dest_dir = r'C:/Github_repositories/Webpage/Images/projects/project-02'

for src, name in sources:
    img = Image.open\(src\).convert\('RGB'\)
    w, h = img.size
    new_w = 1400
    new_h = int\(h * new_w / w\)
    img = img.resize\(\(new_w, new_h\), Image.LANCZOS\)

    img.save\(out, 'JPEG', quality=85\)
    print\(f'{name}: {new_w}x{new_h}, {os.path.getsize\(out\)//1024}KB'\)
")
